comment: P7 consistently engaged with P2’s topics, answered fully, laughed lightly, mirrored complaints about weather and appliances, shared personal details (grandchildren, daughter), and closed warmly (“It was nice to meet you… Have a good afternoon”), all signaling that she experienced the interaction as warm and positive toward P2.

Although P7 notes the previous partner’s connection was terrible, this call quickly stabilizes with clear mutual hearing and no mid-conversation glitches reported. The interaction flows without tech-related disruptions, so the videoconference quality for this dyad appears good.

The transcript reliably attributes lines to P7, captures her main statements, and preserves the sequence of topics. There is some overlap and fragmentation due to simultaneous speech, but overall it is sufficiently accurate for analyzing her experience and the social dynamics.
